commentaries.author: Gennadius of Constantinople
commentaries.content: Once again Paul takes up his earlier theme and by adding the word brother shows how inappropriate this kind of judging is. .

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: At first sight, Paul seems to be attacking the stronger here, but he is also laying into the legalists, by calling their attention to the great benefit which they have received in Christ and to the terror of the judgment to come.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
